name: Fosamax / Osteofos
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Nitrogen-containing bisphosphonate that is incorporated into bone matrix and inhibits osteoclast-mediated bone resorption by inhibiting farnesyl pyrophosphate synthase.
food_interactions: Take with plain water only — other beverages reduce absorption
Must remain upright for 30 minutes after taking
contraindications: Inability to sit upright for 30 minutes
what_to_avoid: Take first thing in morning with plain water — do NOT lie down for 30 minutes
Do not eat for 30 minutes after
Dental check-up before starting — risk of jaw osteonecrosis
